name: opencae
description: OpenCAE local CAD/CAE simulation MVP scaffold.

scripts.build: pnpm build:core && pnpm --filter @opencae/api build && pnpm --filter @opencae/web build
scripts.build:core: pnpm ensure:core && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @opencae/core build && pnpm --filter @opencae/examples build && pnpm --filter @opencae/solver-cpu build && pnpm --filter @opencae/solver-wasm build && pnpm --filter @opencae/solver-webgpu build && pnpm --filter @opencae/viewer build
scripts.verify:perf: pnpm build:core && pnpm --filter @opencae/web build && node scripts/verify-web-performance.mjs
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm verify:runner-version && pnpm build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.containers.jsonc --containers-rollout=immediate
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dry-run: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm verify:runner-version && pnpm build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.containers.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.deploy:core-cloud: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm verify:runner-version && pnpm build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.containers.jsonc --containers-rollout=immediate
scripts.deploy:core-cloud:dry-run: pnpm verify:cloudflare-config && pnpm verify:runner-version && pnpm build:cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.containers.jsonc --dry-run
scripts.containers:build:core-cloud: wrangler containers build services/opencae-core-cloud -t opencae/opencae-core-cloud:0.1.3 --config wrangler.containers.jsonc
scripts.reset:local: pnpm --filter @opencae/db reset && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
